subtasks.description: Evaluate the bulk PII export request against data governance and compliance policies. Determine if the export is authorized, what safeguards apply (encryption, audit logging, retention limits), and whether additional approval is required.

plan.cost_rationale: This request involves PII (names, emails, phone numbers) which triggers mandatory policy evaluation. A mid-tier policy_action is required because the decision involves multiple policy domains (data privacy, access control, compliance) and may require assessment of the analyst's role, the stated purpose ("analysis"), and applicable regulations (GDPR, CCPA, etc.). We do NOT generate the SQL export before policy clearance—the policy check must gate the technical execution. Only one subtask needed; no technical export task is added without approved policy guidance first.

output.reason: The bulk PII export request by analyst 'ana-bob' is denied. POL-501 requires explicit privacy approval from Legal and CISO sign-off, neither of which has been obtained. POL-502 mandates data minimization — exporting names, emails, and phone numbers constitutes sensitive PII and is not permitted without a demonstrated business-critical justification. POL-503 conditions (audit logging and 30-day retention limit) could be satisfied, but are moot until upstream approvals are secured. The action cannot proceed until Legal approval and CISO sign-off are obtained, and a business-critical justification is formally documented.
applied_constraints: No Legal approval on record for this export request — required by POL-501
No CISO sign-off on record — required by POL-501
Requested fields (names, emails, phone numbers) are classified as sensitive PII — export blocked by POL-502 without business-critical justification
If approvals are obtained, audit logging must be enabled prior to export — required by POL-503
If approvals are obtained, exported data must be subject to a 30-day retention limit and then securely deleted — required by POL-503
If approvals are obtained, export must use encryption in transit and at rest
Analyst role 'data-analyst' does not carry inherent authority to self-authorize PII bulk exports
